controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Trusts process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Trusts process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Trusts process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your Customer Identification Procedure include risk-based systems to verify that the trust exists and that the names of all trustees and beneficiaries (or a description of each class of beneficiary) have been provided?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls for verifying trust existence and identifying trustees and beneficiaries
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure for trusts does not include the required risk-based systems to verify trust existence and collect trustee and beneficiary information. Update your process to include controls designed to reasonably satisfy that the trust exists and that the name of each trustee and beneficiary, or a description of each class of beneficiary, has been provided, as required under rules 4.4.2, 4.4.2(1), and 4.4.2(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information about trusts, including trust name, trustee business name, trust type, country of establishment, settlor name (subject to exceptions), and applicable trustee information?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the trust (if any)
Full business name of the trustee in respect of the trust (if any)
Country in which the trust was established
Full name of the settlor (unless material contribution <$10k, deceased, simplified verification used, or customer is custodian/nominee)
If any trustee is an individual: information required under the individual CDD procedure for at least one trustee
If any trustee is a company: information required under the company CDD procedure for at least one trustee

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not capture the minimum required information about trust customers. Update your process to collect the full trust name, trustee business name, trust type, country of establishment, settlor name (subject to statutory exceptions), and complete individual or company identification information for at least one trustee, as required under rule 4.4.3 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems to determine whether any additional KYC information about the trust's existence should be collected beyond the minimum?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you determine what additional trust information to collect based on ML/TF risk
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not include risk-based systems to determine when additional information about the trust's existence should be collected. Implement controls that assess ML/TF risk and determine whether information beyond the minimum should be collected for each trust customer, as required under rule 4.4.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify, at a minimum, the trust name, information about at least one trustee (following individual or company verification procedures), and the settlor name (subject to exceptions)?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the trust (if any)
Information about at least one trustee (individual or company) using the applicable CDD procedure
Full name of the settlor (unless material contribution <$10k, deceased, simplified verification used, or customer is custodian/nominee)

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not verify the minimum required information about trust customers. Update your process to verify the trust name, complete information about at least one trustee using the relevant individual or company verification procedure, and the settlor name (subject to statutory exceptions), as required under rule 4.4.5 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems to determine whether and to what extent any additional KYC information about the trust's existence should be verified beyond the minimum?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you determine what additional trust information to verify based on ML/TF risk
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include risk-based systems to determine when additional trust information should be verified. Implement controls that assess ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service and determine whether information beyond the minimum should be verified for each trust customer, as required under rules 4.4.6 and 4.4.7.

controls.label: Does your procedure use the simplified trustee verification procedure for eligible trusts (ASIC-registered MIS, wholesale-only unregistered MIS, Commonwealth-regulated trusts, or government superannuation funds)?
controls.detail-label: Describe your simplified verification process and how you verify trust eligibility

items.label: Verify trust is a managed investment scheme registered by ASIC
Verify trust is an unregistered MIS with only wholesale clients and no small scale offerings (s1012E)
Verify trust is registered and subject to Commonwealth statutory regulatory oversight
Verify trust is a government superannuation fund established by legislation

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include the simplified trustee verification option for eligible trusts. Implement the simplified procedure that verifies the trust is an ASIC-registered MIS, wholesale-only unregistered MIS, Commonwealth-regulated trust, or government superannuation fund, which satisfies the verification requirements under rule 4.4.8 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the full name and address of each trustee and either the full name of each beneficiary or details of each class of beneficiaries?

checklist-items.label: Full name and address of each trustee

items.label: Details of each class of beneficiaries (if identified by class membership)

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect complete trustee and beneficiary information for private trusts. Update your process to collect the full name and address of each trustee and either the full name of each beneficiary or details of each beneficiary class, as required under rule 4.4.9 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems to determine whether any additional KYC information about trustees or beneficiaries should be collected beyond the minimum?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you determine what additional trustee or beneficiary information to collect based on ML/TF risk
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not include risk-based systems to determine when additional trustee or beneficiary information should be collected. Implement controls that assess ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service and determine whether information beyond the minimum should be collected, as required under rules 4.4.10 and 4.4.12.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems to determine whether and how to verify the name of any trustee or beneficiary, or details of beneficiary classes, or any other collected KYC information?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based approach to verifying trustee and beneficiary information
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include risk-based systems to determine whether and how to verify trustee and beneficiary information. Implement controls that assess ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service and determine the appropriate verification approach using the approved sources under rule 4.4.15, as required under rules 4.4.11 and 4.4.12.

controls.label: Does your verification procedure rely on trust deeds (or certified copies/extracts), reliable and independent documents, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of these sources?
controls.detail-label: Describe what sources you use to verify trust information

items.label: Trust deed, certified copy, or certified extract of trust deed
Reliable and independent documents relating to the trust

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not use the approved sources for verifying trust information. Update your process to base verification on trust deeds (or certified copies/extracts), reliable and independent documents, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of these sources, as required under rule 4.4.15 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Where verification information is not otherwise reasonably available, does your procedure accept disclosure certificates as reliable and independent documents for risk-based verification purposes?
controls.detail-label: Describe when and how you use disclosure certificates for trust verification
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include the option to use disclosure certificates when information is not otherwise reasonably available. Update your process to accept disclosure certificates as reliable and independent documents for risk-based verification under paragraphs 4.4.6 or 4.4.11, as permitted under rule 4.4.16 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems to respond to any discrepancy that arises during verification, so that you can determine whether you are reasonably satisfied about the trust's existence and the identity of trustees and beneficiaries?
controls.detail-label: Describe your process for handling discrepancies identified during trust verification
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include risk-based systems to respond to discrepancies arising during trust verification. Implement controls that enable you to respond to discrepancies and determine whether you remain reasonably satisfied about trust existence and trustee/beneficiary identification, as required under rule 4.4.17.

controls.label: When your customer is a custodian or nominee of a custodian, does your procedure omit the requirements to collect beneficiary information and apply the special rules regarding underlying customer due diligence?
controls.detail-label: Describe your modified CDD procedure for custodians and nominees of custodians
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not apply the special exemptions for custodians and nominees of custodians. Update your process to omit beneficiary information collection (rules 4.4.2(2) and 4.4.9(2)) and apply the modified requirements regarding underlying customer due diligence for Parts 4.12, 4.13, and Chapter 15, as specified under rule 4.4.18 and its subparagraphs.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify that customers claiming custodian or nominee of custodian status meet all the definitional requirements, including holding appropriate AFSL, satisfying geographical links or Reporting Entities Roll entry, and providing required certifications?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you verify custodian/nominee status and obtain required certifications

checklist-items.label: Verify the company is acting as a trustee
Verify provision of custodial/depository service (item 46, AML/CTF Act)

items.label: Verify satisfaction of geographical link test (s6(6))
Obtain written certification of Reporting Entities Roll entry

checklist-items.label: Obtain written certification of completed CIP and OCDD for underlying customers

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not adequately verify custodian or nominee of custodian status. Implement controls to verify trustee capacity, custodial service provision, AFSL or exemption, geographical links or Roll entry, and obtain written certifications regarding underlying customer due diligence, as required under rule 4.4.19 and its subparagraphs.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: Trust Existence Verification
groups.description: Risk-based systems to verify that the trust exists and that trustees and beneficiaries have been identified.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Minimum information required about the trust itself, including trust name, type, settlor, and trustee details.

groups.title: Verification of Trust Information
groups.description: Verify minimum trust information and determine what additional information requires verification based on ML/TF risk.

groups.title: Simplified Trustee Verification Procedure
groups.description: Optional simplified procedure for ASIC-registered MIS, wholesale-only unregistered MIS, Commonwealth-regulated trusts, and government superannuation funds.

groups.title: Collection of Trustee and Beneficiary Information
groups.description: Collect the full name and address of each trustee and beneficiary information (names or class details).

groups.title: Verification of Trustees and Beneficiaries
groups.description: Risk-based determination of whether and how to verify trustee and beneficiary information.

groups.title: Responding to Discrepancies
groups.description: Risk-based systems to respond to discrepancies arising during verification.

groups.title: Custodians and Nominees of Custodians
groups.description: Modified CDD requirements for customers that are custodians or nominees of custodians providing custodial or depository services.
